column2: Verify CAA Approval of Entity Ownership Change
column3: ['Confirm there is a change in entity ownership. ', 'Determine if the change in entity ownership is considered significant according to the provided guidance. ', 'Submit an application for the variation (change in entity ownership) to the CAA. ', 'Wait for the approval from the CAA. ', 'Verify that the CAA approves the change in entity ownership. ']
column4: ['The current entity owner has been replaced with a new one. ', 'The change meets at least one of the criteria for significance: (1) Change in Entity ownership, (2) Change in accountable manager, etc. ', 'An application has been submitted with all required documentation and information. ', "The status of the application is 'Pending Approval'. ", "The status of the application has been updated to 'Approved' and a certificate of approval has been issued. "]
